technical_replicate: From the replicate runs of nLC-MS/MS analysis
experimental_design: comparison of different grades of gliomas
compared the proteomic data with transcriptome data for different grades of gliomas
factor_value: selected six age-matched samples of either sex from each group of Grade II (20–50 years), Grade III (30–50 years) and Glioblastoma (WHO Grade IV; 50–60 years)
number_of_fractions: we have performed sub-cellular fractionation and isolated nuclear fractions
number_of_technical_replicates: From the replicate runs of nLC-MS/MS analysis
